# Full-run threshold declaration — fixture

## Frozen threshold block (reference)

| Field | Frozen value |
| --- | --- |
| `full_run_duration_target` | At least one operator session spanning both tranches |

## Declaration

### **`threshold-not-met`**

### Why (audit-defensible)

1. **`full_run_duration_target` (qualitative):** Fixture declares separate sessions; the **`full_run_duration_target`** field is **not** met under the frozen text.
